description: Test scenarios based on identified pain points - covers emotional and practical triggers

scenarios.message: My credit score isn't great. Will I get rejected if I apply?
scenarios.what_to_say: Let's check your eligibility together - no judgment, just facts

scenarios.message: I've been rejected for loans before and I'm scared it will happen again
scenarios.what_not_to_say: Don't worry, you'll be approved this time
scenarios.what_to_say: That sounds frustrating. Past rejections don't define your future options. Let's explore what's changed

scenarios.message: I made really bad financial decisions and now I'm drowning in debt. I feel stupid
scenarios.what_not_to_say: You should have been more careful
scenarios.what_to_say: Many people face this. You're taking a positive step by seeking help

scenarios.message: I don't understand what EMI, APR, or floating interest means. Everyone else seems to get it
scenarios.what_to_say: Let me break that down - [explain in plain language

scenarios.message: I can't sleep thinking about my money situation. I have too many EMIs and supplier bills due
scenarios.what_to_say: Let's take this one step at a time. First, let's just talk about what you need

scenarios.message: I don't know where to start. There are so many options and I feel paralyzed
scenarios.what_to_say: Let's start with just one thing. Tell me about your biggest concern right now

scenarios.message: Life keeps throwing unexpected expenses at me. I feel completely helpless
scenarios.what_to_say: That's genuinely tough. Let's talk about what you *can* control here

scenarios.message: Nothing I do seems to work. Every financial decision backfires
scenarios.what_not_to_say: You just need to try harder
scenarios.what_to_say: Let's look at what's working, even if it's small. Sometimes patterns are hiding there

scenarios.message: I'm hesitant because lenders always have hidden fees. I've been cheated before
scenarios.what_not_to_say: We're the best lender in the market
scenarios.what_to_say: Here's exactly what you'll pay - all fees included, no surprises

scenarios.message: Everyone just wants to sell me something. I don't feel heard, just pitched
scenarios.what_not_to_say: Our product is perfect for you
scenarios.what_to_say: I heard you. Let me ask - what matters most to you right now?

scenarios.message: There are too many loan options and I can't compare them effectively
scenarios.what_not_to_say: Here's a spreadsheet of all options
scenarios.what_to_say: Let's narrow it down. What matters most - speed, low rate, or flexibility?

scenarios.message: I don't understand the differences between fixed rate, floating rate, and hybrid options
scenarios.what_not_to_say: It's in the terms and conditions
scenarios.what_to_say: Fixed stays the same every month. Floating changes with market rates. Here's when each helps...

scenarios.message: What documents will I need to apply? And how long will the whole process take?
scenarios.what_to_say: You'll need [documents]. Here's the timeline: [specific steps]

scenarios.message: What happens if something goes wrong during the loan application?
scenarios.what_to_say: If [issue], here's what happens and how we'll help you

scenarios.message: How is interest calculated? I never understand why the numbers don't add up
scenarios.what_to_say: Let me show you the calculation step by step with your numbers

scenarios.message: What's considered a good interest rate? How do I know if 12% is too high?
scenarios.what_to_say: For your profile, 12% is [how it compares]. Here's how it breaks down per month

scenarios.message: I need money quickly. There's an unexpected medical emergency and I can't wait
scenarios.what_to_say: I understand this is urgent. Here's what we can do in [timeline] for you

scenarios.message: I have an unexpected business expense and I can't wait weeks for approval
scenarios.what_not_to_say: You'll have to wait for normal processing
scenarios.what_to_say: For business situations, we can expedite. Here's what we need from you today

scenarios.message: What if I can't pay the EMI in some months? Can I prepay if things improve?
scenarios.what_not_to_say: You have to pay on time, no exceptions
scenarios.what_to_say: You can prepay anytime without penalty. If there's a tough month, let's discuss options then

scenarios.message: I'm worried about what happens if I miss an EMI. Will they come after me?
scenarios.what_to_say: If you miss a payment, here's what happens. But first, here's how we can help you avoid that
